title: NMC Healthcare opens new multi-specialty clinic in Al Riyadh City, Abu Dhabi
summary: The facility aims to improve access to primary and specialised healthcare services for residents within the rapidly growing residential community.
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
UAE—NMC Healthcare Group, a leading integrated private healthcare provider in the country, has expanded its network with the opening of a new multi-specialty clinic in Al Riyadh City, Abu Dhabi.

The facility aims to improve access to primary and specialised healthcare services for residents within the rapidly growing residential community.

The new clinic brings together a broad spectrum of outpatient medical services under one roof, enabling patients to access coordinated care closer to home.

NMC Healthcare designed the facility to respond to increasing demand for accessible, high-quality healthcare in suburban areas of Abu Dhabi.

Wide range of medical specialties under one roof

The Al Riyadh City Clinic delivers a comprehensive suite of healthcare services, including family medicine, internal medicine, dermatology, obstetrics and gynaecology, paediatrics, psychiatry, and radiology.

Each specialty operates within an integrated care model that supports continuity of treatment and streamlined patient management.

Medical teams at the facility provide diagnosis, treatment, and preventive care across all departments, ensuring patients receive coordinated care without having to travel to multiple healthcare centres.

The clinic also supports chronic disease management and routine health check-ups, further strengthening its role as a primary care hub for the surrounding population.

Modern facility designed for patient convenience

Spanning approximately 1,600 square metres, the two-storey clinic features a modern architectural design focused on patient comfort and efficiency.

NMC Healthcare equipped the facility with advanced medical technologies to support accurate diagnostics and effective treatment delivery across all departments.

The layout prioritises patient flow, reducing waiting times and improving service accessibility.

Clinical and administrative areas are structured to enhance operational efficiency while maintaining a calm and welcoming environment for patients and families.

To further improve convenience, the clinic includes an in-house pharmacy that allows patients to collect prescribed medications immediately after consultations.

This integrated service reduces delays and improves treatment adherence by eliminating the need for external pharmacy visits.

Insurance coverage and accessibility

The clinic has secured Thiqa Insurance approval, enabling eligible patients in Al Riyadh City to access healthcare services under comprehensive insurance coverage.

This approval ensures smoother administrative processes and enhances affordability for patients seeking care at the facility.

By aligning with key insurance providers, NMC Healthcare supports wider healthcare accessibility while simplifying the patient experience from consultation through to treatment and medication access.

Leadership perspective on expansion

David Hadley, Chief Executive Officer of NMC Healthcare, highlighted the organisation’s focus on delivering community-based care through its expanding network.

“We are delighted to bring NMC Healthcare’s trusted services to Al Riyadh City, a growing and family-focused community in Abu Dhabi,” Hadley said.

He noted that their new clinic offers families a comprehensive range of healthcare services, ensuring fast, convenient access to exceptional medical care in their own neighbourhood.

He also noted that Al Riyadh City Clinic is part of their broader mission to deliver personalised, high-quality healthcare to communities across the UAE.

Supporting national healthcare development goals

The opening of the Al Riyadh City Clinic aligns with NMC Healthcare’s broader strategy to expand its presence across key residential and urban areas in the UAE.

The initiative supports efforts to enhance healthcare accessibility and strengthen outpatient care infrastructure within the country.

The development also aligns with the UAE’s national vision to advance healthcare innovation and improve service delivery across the sector.

Through its growing network of community-focused clinics, NMC Healthcare continues to invest in patient-centred care models designed to meet evolving healthcare needs across diverse populations.
